Include trials that study pancreatic cancer.
Include trials that investigate targeted therapies or immunotherapies.
Include trials that report survival outcomes such as progression-free survival (PFS) or overall survival (OS).
Include trials that enroll biomarker-stratified populations, including but not limited to HER2-positive, MSI-H, or PD-L1 positive.
Exclude phase III trials with fewer than 100 patients enrolled.
Include trials whose drugs under investigation are FDA-approved.
